scripts.dev: bun run --filter jsoncrack-react build && bun run --filter www dev
scripts.build: bun run --filter jsoncrack-react build && bun run --filter www build
scripts.lint: bun run --filter jsoncrack-react build && (bun run --filter jsoncrack-react lint & bun run --filter www lint & wait)
scripts.lint:fix: bun run --filter jsoncrack-react lint:fix & bun run --filter www lint:fix & wait
scripts.analyze: bun run --filter jsoncrack-react build && ANALYZE=true bun run --filter www build
